creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
From: TAKATSU Tomonari <tota@FreeBSD.org>
Subject: Re: ports/175257: [PATCH] japanese/ruby-mecab: Add license information etc.
Date: Sun, 17 Feb 2013 20:20:56 +0900

> I have tried your patch on RedPorts and caught following error.
> MeCab_wrap.cpp:1859:26: error: ruby/version.h: No such file or directory
> *** [MeCab_wrap.o] Error code 1
> Please see https://redports.org/buildarchive/20130217101900-40541/
> and build logs in "Links" in more details.
> Could you tell me your environment?

The issue seems to specific to ruby 1.8. My environment is ruby 1.9
and there is no problem. I'll investigate it but have to create test
environment at first. So please wait for a while. I'll reply to you
when there is a progress.

Regards.

---
Yasuhiro KIMURA
